hooks.prompt: Before stopping: Check if TodoWrite has incomplete tasks. If yes, say 'You have incomplete tasks — continue?' If sessions/evolve_signals.md exists and this was a gOS session, scan the last few exchanges and append any unlogged signals (accept/rework/reject/love/skip/repeat) with today's date. Keep it to one line per signal.

Before compaction: Scan recent conversation for evolve signals (accept/rework/reject/love/skip/repeat from gOS commands) and append any unlogged ones to sessions/evolve_signals.md. Also update sessions/scratchpad.md with current task state so it survives compaction.
